meaning: n.印度地方,东西印度群岛
examples: He sailed for the West Indies from Portsmouth.
He aims to follow Columbus's voyage to the West Indies.
From the West Indies also come oil, mineral pitch and many forest products.
Meanwhile former West Indies cricketer Colin Croft and BBC pundit has said he sympathises with Gayle.
Wicketkeeper Sarah Taylor returns after being rested for England's recent series defeat in the West Indies.
